title: leucanthemum pallens subsp. leucolepis
intro: Leucanthemum pallens subsp. leucolepis, also known as the white daisy or ox-eye daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of leucanthemum pallens subsp. leucolepis include soothing and calming effects on the digestive system, reducing inflammation and relieving pain. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
